content: Heads up that @Mahendra Paipuri created https://github.com/IQSS/dataverse/pull/12544 to internationalize password reset emails! :tada:

@Alyssa Conlon (and others), it got me thinking... would Borealis (or other installations) be interested in reviewing or testing this pull request? It would give us, the core dev team, more confidence when merging.
Thanks for flagging it! We'll have a look :+1: happy to help out with review/testing
